seo.title: KARAHOCA - World-Class Cleaning Products
seo.description: KARAHOCA is the leading manufacturer of cleaning products in Turkey. Two brands: DIOX & AYLUX. 30+ years of experience, 200+ employees, 15+ countries.
seo.keywords: karahoca, detergents, turkey, DIOX, AYLUX, laundry powder, general cleaner, liquid soap, world quality

hero.title: Setting a New Standard for Cleanliness Globally
hero.subtitle: Innovative cleaning solutions with superior performance and design worthy of an international brand.

customOrder.title: We Manufacture Under Your Brand

diox.title: DIOX
diox.description: Concentrated cleaning power for homes and facilities.

aylux.title: AYLUX
aylux.description: Elegance of purity and effortless daily routine.

about.title: About Us
about.shortDescription: A leading company in the detergent sector for over 30 years. We deliver high-quality cleaning products under the AYLUX and DIOX brands to more than 15 countries worldwide, committed to quality, innovation, and sustainability.
about.subtitle: Moving Forward with Confidence

history.title: Company History and Development
history.description: Our company was founded 30 years ago on the principles of quality and reliability in the chemical sector, and has gained a strong position by providing high-quality chemical solutions to our customers. In 2014, in response to increasing demand, we moved to the detergent sector and began our journey in developing cleaning products. Today, we are proud to be a trusted brand in domestic and international markets

milestones.title: Milestones and Achievements
milestones.description: Through our innovative approach and investments in cutting-edge technologies, we have made a difference in the industry. In 2019, we expanded our modern production facilities to improve product quality to the highest level and streamlined our operations. Thanks to the work of our dedicated team, we continue our mission to develop effective and sustainable cleaning products successfully

vision.title: Global Vision and Commitment to Quality
vision.description: The cleaning products we produce under the AYLUX and DIOX brands are exported to more than 15 countries and are preferred by consumers worldwide. By always prioritizing customer satisfaction, we continue to set new standards in the industry. According to our principles of quality, innovation and sustainability, we firmly pursue our goal of leading the cleaning products sector

seo.title: About Us - 30 Years Success Story | KARAHOCA
seo.description: Discover KARAHOCA's journey from 1995 to today. 30+ years experience, 15+ distribution countries, 4 main industries, 2 global brands: DIOX & AYLUX. Our values: Quality, Innovation, Sustainability.
seo.keywords: about KARAHOCA, company history since 1995, global vision, core values, AYLUX, DIOX, milestones achievements, 30 years experience, 15 countries distribution, Turkish detergent company, cleaning products manufacturer

hero.title: About Us
hero.description: A leading company in the detergent industry for over 30 years, delivering innovative and high-quality solutions to global markets

history.title: Our History and Evolution
history.paragraph1: Our company was founded 30 years ago on the principles of quality and reliability in the chemical sector. From the beginning, we focused on delivering high-quality chemical solutions to our customers, which helped us build a strong reputation in the market. Through commitment to excellence and continuous innovation, we became a trusted partner for many companies and institutions.
history.paragraph2: In 2014, a major turning point occurred in our journey. In response to growing market demand, we decided to expand into the detergent sector. We began a new journey in developing and producing cleaning products under our two brands, AYLUX and DIOX. Today, we are proud to be a trusted brand in more than 15 countries around the world.

year1.title: Foundation
year1.description: The beginning of our journey in the chemical sector with a focus on quality and reliability

year2.title: Detergent Expansion
year2.description: Launch of AYLUX and DIOX brands in the cleaning products market

year3.title: Development and Modernization
year3.description: Expansion of production facilities and implementation of latest technologies to ensure highest quality standards

vision.title: Our Global Vision
vision.description: We aspire to be the first choice in the detergent sector globally. Our products are exported to more than 15 countries and are preferred by consumers worldwide. We continue to set new standards in the industry through commitment to customer satisfaction, superior quality, continuous innovation, and environmental responsibility.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We are committed to the highest quality standards in every product we make, from raw material selection to final delivery

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously invest in research and development to deliver innovative and effective cleaning solutions that meet our customers' needs

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We believe in our responsibility towards the environment and work on developing eco-friendly and sustainable products

cta.title: Want to Be Our Partner?
cta.description: Join our global network of partners and be part of KARAHOCA's success story

footer.description: Leading the detergent industry with innovative solutions, reliable performance, and global quality.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Subscribe for the latest offers and products

seo.title: Production Process | KARAHOCA
seo.description: Discover KARAHOCA's advanced production process from raw materials to packaging with strict quality control
seo.keywords: detergent production, manufacturing process, quality control, ISO standards, production safety

production.heroDescription: Our production process combines state-of-the-art technology at every stage with rigorous quality control. From sourcing the finest raw materials to formulation and packaging, we ensure that each product meets the highest standards of performance and safety. Our team is committed to creating effective and sustainable detergent solutions that meet diverse customer needs.

process.title: Process Stages
process.subtitle: From raw materials to packaging — a unified path to quality.

sourcing.title: Sourcing & Selection
sourcing.description: Selecting reliable suppliers and internal inspection of raw materials.

mixing.title: Mixing & Formulation
mixing.description: Precise recipes and automated control systems to ensure consistency.

packaging.title: Filling & Labeling
packaging.description: Efficient packaging lines with weight checks and sealing.

safety.title: Safety & Certification
safety.content1: Strict adherence to occupational health and safety standards.
safety.content2: Periodic verification and industry-relevant ISO standards.
safety.content3: Complete batch tracking and quality record for each product.

seo.title: Our Dryer | KARAHOCA
seo.description: Discover KARAHOCA's advanced dryer technology - high-capacity production with raw material manufacturing capability
seo.keywords: detergent dryer, raw material production, manufacturing technology, industrial production, concentrated detergents

dryer.heroDescription: The dryer is designed not only to produce high-quality detergents but also has the capability to manufacture raw materials directly within the system. This integrated approach enhances efficiency and ensures consistent quality. Our high-capacity facility provides the ability to meet large orders while also offering flexibility in customizing formulations to meet specific market needs.

pillars.title: Key Advantages
pillars.subtitle: Efficiency, flexibility, and rapid response to large orders.

capacity.title: High Production Capacity
capacity.description: Production line capable of meeting massive orders quickly.

integration.title: Process Integration
integration.description: Ability to produce raw materials within the system to reduce waste.

consistency.title: Quality Consistency
consistency.description: Precise testing for each batch to ensure consistent results.

seo.title: Our Goal | KARAHOCA
seo.description: Learn about our goals and roadmap for continuous growth and innovation in the detergent sector
seo.keywords: KARAHOCA goals, company objectives, innovation, expansion, quality, environmental responsibility

goal.heroDescription: Our company is committed to continuous growth and innovation in the detergent sector. Our future goals include expanding our production capacity, developing environmentally friendly and sustainable product lines, and integrating advanced technologies to enhance efficiency and quality. We aim to build a global presence, establish strong partnerships, and be leaders in innovation. While exceeding customer expectations, we will continue to promote environmental responsibility.

pillars.title: Our Work Pillars
pillars.subtitle: A practical roadmap to achieve our vision.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.description: Research and development to deliver effective formulas with less environmental impact.

expansion.title: Expansion and Capacity
expansion.description: Increasing production capacity and distribution partnerships in new markets.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.description: Strict manufacturing standards and comprehensive performance testing in every batch.

goals.title: Goals 2025–2027
goals.content1: Reduce water and energy consumption by 20%.
goals.content3: Reach 60+ countries through certified distribution partners.

newsPage.sectionSubtitle: New launches, fresh partnerships, and the exhibitions where we represent our brands.
